data.narrative: The student demonstrated outstanding multi-layer diagnostic skills by correctly isolating the database connection pools and implementing BullMQ backoff policies. They quickly identified the cache key namespace collision during recreation, demonstrating senior-level architectural thinking.

dimension_scores.observation: Formulated clear hypotheses regarding the coupling boundaries between the API service, background worker, and cache namespace.
dimension_scores.evidence: Identified that the redirect cache and deduplication check collided on redirect:${code} keys.

dimension_scores.observation: Analyzed DB connection starvation logs to trace the queue worker retry storm.
dimension_scores.evidence: Identified that BullMQ retries without backoff exhaust connection pools.

dimension_scores.observation: Wrote an automated integration test verifying job deduplication, link deletion, and recreation logic.
dimension_scores.evidence: Implemented the recreating link duplicate-prevention test case in integration.test.ts.

dimension_scores.observation: Structured concise status updates and identified critical underlying hardware contention vectors.
dimension_scores.evidence: Identified PostgreSQL database hardware engine (CPU/disk I/O) as an unisolated shared resource.

dimension_scores.observation: Traced the root cause of the pool exhaustion to lack of retry limit, missing backoff, and a shared client pool.
dimension_scores.evidence: Parameterize db.ts with maxConnections to separate API and worker connection pools.

dimension_scores.observation: Anticipated regression side-effects of cache namespace invalidation.
dimension_scores.evidence: Identified the queue retry namespace collision during recreation.

strengths: Demonstrated exceptional root-cause depth by tracing the N+1 pool starvation to lack of client isolation and resolving it by parameterizing connection limits.
data.recommendation: Prepare to write a formal blameless postmortem in Module 7 to prevent this class of multi-layer regression from occurring again.

public_evidence.artifact: Database client helper, analytics worker queue, and Redis client
public_evidence.student_action: Isolated connection pools, configured BullMQ retry policies, and namespaced Redis cache keys.
public_evidence.technical_detail: apps/api/src/db.ts, apps/api/src/jobs/analytics.ts, and apps/api/src/redis.ts modification to isolate pools and key namespaces.
public_evidence.proof: Automated integration tests verifying cache invalidation, connection pooling, and duplicate analytics prevention pass (14/14 tests).
public_evidence.ability: Debugs and isolates multi-layer shared resource dependencies.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows the candidate understands system-level coupling and can secure shared infrastructure from cascading failures.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Isolating DB connections, adding BullMQ retry exponential backoff, and namespacing Redis cache keys

teaching_approaches.detail: Parameterizing getDb and isolating redis cache key paths
